vertical.description: The vertical code this pricing applies to

state.description: Two letter US state code, uppercase

active.description: Whether this buyer is currently accepting leads in this state

cpl.description: The cost per lead this buyer pays in this state

ipl.description: Computed as cpl multiplied by the buyer's ipl_fee_pct at write time

paused_at.description: When this state pricing was paused. Nullable.

paused_reason.description: Reason this state pricing was paused. Nullable.

paused_by.description: The user id who paused it. Nullable.
